nodes.name: ChatGrpcEndpoint.java
nodes.summary: gRPC service endpoint exposing chat operations (start direct/group chat, create/read/delete/react to messages) that delegates to ChatCommandUseCase and converts use-case results into protobuf responses.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses chained protobuf Builder pattern (newBuilder()....build()) extensively to construct gRPC response messages.

nodes.name: ChatGrpcEndpoint
nodes.summary: gRPC service implementation for chat commands, wrapping ChatCommandUseCase calls with request parsing and protobuf response building.

nodes.name: buildCreateChatMessageResponse
nodes.summary: Builds a CreateChatMessageResponse protobuf message from a chat message command result, including attachments and notification target user ids.

nodes.name: startDirectChat
nodes.summary: gRPC handler that builds a StartDirectChatCommand from the request and delegates to ChatCommandUseCase to start a direct chat.

nodes.name: startGroupChat
nodes.summary: gRPC handler that builds a StartGroupChatCommand from the request and delegates to ChatCommandUseCase to start a group chat.

nodes.name: createChatMessage
nodes.summary: gRPC handler that builds a CreateChatMessageCommand from the request and delegates to ChatCommandUseCase to persist a new chat message.

nodes.name: readChatMessage
nodes.summary: gRPC handler that builds a ReadChatMessageCommand from the request and delegates to ChatCommandUseCase to update a member's read position.

nodes.name: deleteChatMessage
nodes.summary: gRPC handler that builds a DeleteChatMessageCommand from the request and delegates to ChatCommandUseCase to delete a chat message.

nodes.name: reactChatMessage
nodes.summary: gRPC handler that builds a ReactChatMessageCommand from the request and delegates to ChatCommandUseCase to add or remove a message reaction.

nodes.name: ChatCommandService.java
nodes.summary: Core chat command service implementing room creation and direct/group chat start, plus message create/read/delete/react business logic, backed by ChatMapper, RoomMapper, RoomMemberCache and RoomReadPositionCache.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines database access (via MyBatis-style mappers) with Redis-backed caches (RoomMemberCache, RoomReadPositionCache) to keep hot chat state consistent with the database.

nodes.name: ChatCommandService
nodes.summary: Implements the chat command use case: room creation, direct/group chat initiation, and message create/read/delete/react workflows, coordinating persistence via mappers and caches.

nodes.name: createRoom
nodes.summary: Creates and persists a new ChatRoomsDTO via ChatMapper for a given room type, status, name and creator.

nodes.name: validateSendBody
nodes.summary: Validates that a chat message has a non-blank message type and either text content or attachments before it can be sent.

nodes.name: buildEnterRoomInfo
nodes.summary: Builds the enter-room info payload (room, member list, active notice) for a group room by requester user id.

nodes.name: buildDirectEnterRoomInfo
nodes.summary: Builds the enter-room info payload for a direct (1:1) chat room between the requester and a target user.

nodes.name: startDirectChat
nodes.summary: Starts (or reuses) a direct chat room between sender and target user, reactivates/creates memberships, refreshes the room member cache, and sends the first chat message.

nodes.name: startGroupChat
nodes.summary: Validates invite member lists, creates a group chat room with the invited members, and sends the first chat message.

nodes.name: createChatMessage
nodes.summary: Persists a new chat message with attachments, computes the sender's unread count baseline, and determines notification target user ids from cached room members minus currently viewing users.

nodes.name: readChatMessage
nodes.summary: Updates a member's last-read message position for a room via the Redis-backed read position cache and returns the update result.

nodes.name: deleteChatMessage
nodes.summary: Marks a chat message as deleted after validating the requester's permission, and returns the deletion result.

nodes.name: reactChatMessage
nodes.summary: Adds or removes a reaction (emoji/reaction code) on a chat message on behalf of a requesting user and returns the reaction event result.

nodes.name: ChatCommandUseCase.java
nodes.summary: Use-case interface declaring the chat command contract (start direct/group chat, create/read/delete/react message) implemented by ChatCommandService and consumed by ChatGrpcEndpoint.

nodes.name: ChatCommandUseCase
nodes.summary: Interface defining the six chat commands (start direct chat, start group chat, create/read/delete/react message) that the gRPC layer invokes and the service layer implements.

nodes.name: CreateChatMessageCommand.java
nodes.summary: Command DTO carrying the fields needed to create a new chat message: room, sender, message type/text, reply target, and attachment ids.

nodes.name: CreateChatMessageCommand
nodes.summary: Data-carrying command object for the create-chat-message use case, holding room id, sender identity, message content, reply target and attachments.

nodes.name: DeleteChatMessageCommand.java
nodes.summary: Command DTO carrying the fields needed to delete a chat message: room id, message id and the requesting user.

nodes.name: ReactChatMessageCommand.java
nodes.summary: Command DTO carrying the fields needed to add or remove a reaction on a chat message, including reaction type/code and add/remove flag.

nodes.name: ReadChatMessageCommand.java
nodes.summary: Command DTO carrying the fields needed to update a member's read position in a room: room id, reader identity and last read message id.

nodes.name: StartDirectChatCommand.java
nodes.summary: Command DTO carrying the fields needed to start a direct (1:1) chat: target user, sender identity, and the first message's content.

nodes.name: StartDirectChatCommand
nodes.summary: Data-carrying command object for starting a direct chat, holding the target user's public id, sender identity, and first message fields.

nodes.name: StartGroupChatCommand.java
nodes.summary: Command DTO carrying the fields needed to start a group chat: room name/thumbnail, invited member ids, sender identity, and first message content.

nodes.name: StartGroupChatCommand
nodes.summary: Data-carrying command object for starting a group chat, holding room name, thumbnail, invited member public ids, sender identity, and first message fields.

nodes.name: ChatMessageViewResponseDTO.java
nodes.summary: Response DTO representing a chat message view returned after creating or fetching a message, including attachments and notification target user ids.

nodes.name: ChatMessageViewResponseDTO
nodes.summary: Represents a single chat message result with sender, content, timestamps, unread count, attachments and notification target user ids.

nodes.name: DeleteChatMessageResponseDTO.java
nodes.summary: Response DTO returned after a chat message is deleted, containing room id, message id, requester and the resulting message status and deletion timestamp.

nodes.name: DeleteChatMessageResponseDTO
nodes.summary: Represents the result of a delete-chat-message operation, including the deleted message id, resulting status, and deletion timestamp.

nodes.name: ReactChatMessageEventResponseDTO.java
nodes.summary: Response DTO returned after a reaction is added or removed on a chat message, including the reaction type/code, added flag, and reaction timestamp.

nodes.name: ReactChatMessageEventResponseDTO
nodes.summary: Represents the result of a react-chat-message operation, including reaction type/code, whether it was added or removed, and the reaction timestamp.

nodes.name: ReadPositionUpdateResponseDTO.java
nodes.summary: Response DTO returned after updating a member's read position, containing old/new last read message ids and whether the position actually changed.

nodes.name: StartChatResponseDTO.java
nodes.summary: Response DTO returned after starting a direct or group chat, bundling the room enter info and the first chat message that was sent.

nodes.name: ChatMessageNotificationDTO.java
nodes.summary: Notification DTO describing a new chat message push notification, including sender identity, message type, preview text and notification timestamp.

nodes.name: ChatMessageNotificationDTO
nodes.summary: Represents a chat message notification payload with room, sender, message type, preview text and notified-at timestamp for push delivery.
